title.en: The ruins of the Boundary Rift.

content.en:
The ruins of the Boundary Rift.

Ye Tian didn't know much about this place, so he didn't speak, only listened to these Dark Sea high-level discussions.

At this time, the Lord of Darkness continued: "The ruins of the boundary rift that opened this time are the ruins of the sixth boundary rift - the ruins of the dragon sea, the danger of the ruins of the dragon sea is medium among the ruins of the boundary rift, and the eight blood transformation realm breaking geniuses, I recommend not entering, at least the primeval level geniuses can enter." Of course, I'm just suggesting that it's up to you whether you get in or not. "

"Lord of Darkness, are you going to enter the ruins of the Dragon Sea this time?"

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor asked.

"This time, I'm not going in. The Lord of Darkness shook his head, "The value of the Ruins of the Dragon Sea is not high for me, and if a bone transformation realm like mine enters the Ruins of the Dragon Sea, the strength will be suppressed a lot, and the gain is not comparable to the pay, so I will not choose to enter it." "

Subsequently, the Dark Sea high-level leaders present discussed for a while before ending the meeting.

......

After the meeting, Ye Tian and Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor talked.

"Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, the Ruins of the Dragon Sea, the Ruins of the Boundary Crack, what is the situation?"

Ye Tian asked.

Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor explained: "The four words "Territorial Sea Boundary Sea" are not called nonsense, territorial waters are those territorial waters where our cultivators were born, and the boundary seam refers to not the area we are in now, but a special area. The area between the territorial sea and the boundary gap is the area of shock flow, and it is also the area with the most extensive area. It's just that the boundary gap is hidden, and it can't be found under normal circumstances. "

As soon as the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor explained like this, Ye Tian also understood.

"What the Lord of Darkness said before, it seems that the ruins of the Boundary Rift are very dangerous?" Ye Tian asked again.

"Hmm!" Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor nodded, "It's dangerous, and it may even fall from the Bone Transformation Realm." Because the ruins of the boundary crack will suppress our strength, the higher the cultivation, the more the strength will be suppressed, such as the Lord of Darkness in the Bone Transformation Realm, if you enter, your strength will also be suppressed. If an ordinary Bone Transformation Realm entered the Ruins of the Boundary Rift, the strength it exerted might not be as high as that of an Ancient Genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm. Therefore, without huge benefits and benefits, the Bone Transformation Realm would not casually enter the ruins of the Boundary Rift. "

"So that's the case!" Ye Tian understood.

From the mouth of the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, Ye Tian knew some of the situation of the Dragon Sea Ruins, such as the fact that this place contained many opportunities and treasures, and they were all treasures that were of great help to the Eight Blood Transformation Realms and the Nine Blood Transformation Realms, and even some were helpful to the Bone Transformation Realm.

"Ruins of the Dragon Sea, I have to go in there!"

Ye Tian decided.

He is now short of resources, if he enters the ruins of the Dragon Sea, if he finds many resources, he may be able to improve his cultivation to the ninth blood transformation realm.

Since the ruins of the Dragon Sea, the ruins of the boundary crack, had just been opened, and the place where the entrance was not stable, Ye Tian and the others could not enter there yet.

However, some of the Blood Transformation Realm powerhouses had already gone to the ruins of the Dragon Sea.

......

The entrance to the ruins of the dragon sea.

The powerhouses of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm and the Nine Blood Transformation Realm gathered here, and they were all waiting.

this day.

Ye Tian also came here and saw this entrance.

The entrance to the Ruins of the Dragon Sea was an unimaginably large crack that cut off the impact flow, and this crack was still expanding.

When this crack does not widen, it is stable.

When the time comes, they can go in.

As time passed, more and more powerhouses of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm and Nine Blood Transformation Realm came here.

Soon, Ye Tian saw a lot of familiar primeval-level geniuses.

Like the Moyu Heavenly Ancestor of Taigu Mountain, the Qingyao Heavenly Ancestor of the Ice and Snow Palace, the Heavenly Ancestor of the Dark Sword Ancestor, the Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor, Ao Heng and other Heavenly Ancestors who have changed into the Blood Transformation Realm eight times and the Blood Transformation Realm nine times have all come.

Obviously, they also want to get a big opportunity in the ruins of the dragon sea, so as to improve their strength.

Finally, the entrance to the crack stopped expanding and was completely secured.

"Get in!"

The Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor was the first to pass.

Other primordial-level geniuses, boundary-breaking level geniuses, and ordinary Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors had all passed.

And a few ordinary Eight Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors, gritted their teeth, and also broke in.

Their idea is simple, as soon as they get a little good, they come out.

However, how many ordinary Heavenly Ancestors of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm were able to resist the temptation of the treasure and withdraw from it in time?

Therefore, the eight blood transformation realms that entered here are afraid that they will fall a lot.

Hys Heavenly Ancestor also came, but he looked at it and sighed again: "Forget it, I'd better stay up slowly, although it is possible to find an opportunity in the ruins of the Dragon Sea, so as to break through to become a seventh-time blood transformation realm primeval-level genius, but it is also possible to fall!"

So, he resisted the temptation and left the place directly.

......

Whoa!!

After many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors entered the ruins of the Dragon Sea, they were teleported to different areas one by one, and it was difficult for them to contact each other.

Because in the ruins of the Dragon Sea, the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors could not communicate with each other, and the news could not be transmitted at all.

Therefore, in the ruins of the Dragon Sea, the Heavenly Ancestors of the Blood Transformation Realm could only rely on themselves, and even if they encountered danger, they could not call for help.

Somewhere in the mountains of the Ruins of the Dragon Sea, Ye Tian appeared here.

Rumble!!!!

The endless suppression struck, so that Ye Tian's body didn't know how many billions of times the suppression he had withdrew, and the strength he exerted was very weak and weak.

"It's such a terrifying suppression, I'm only in the Blood Transformation Realm eight times, if it's the Bone Transformation Realm, it will be even worse if I am suppressed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this moment, a pair of blood-colored pupils covering the heavens and the earth appeared in the void, and a blood-colored world descended, and endless blood-colored hands penetrated through.

"Eight Blood Transformation Realm Breaking Boundary-level genius strength creatures!"

Ye Tian instantly judged it.

But such strength is not a threat to him.

"Ancient Blood Spear!"

Ye Tian struck it, and the primeval blood spear pierced through.

Poof!

He pierced through the Scarlet World, striking a Scarlet Behemoth, pinning its body into the void and obliterating it.

Immediately.

Dense blood-colored giant beasts emerged, and the strength of these blood-colored giant beasts did not have the strength of the eight blood transformation realm breaking geniuses, but it was not inferior to the ordinary seven blood transformation realms, and there were also strength comparable to ordinary eight blood transformation realms.

The point is, there are a lot of these blood-colored behemoths.

"Blood River Behemoth!"

This is the name that Ye Tian found from the copying talent.

The strength of these Blood River Behemoths was not to be feared, and Ye Tian made a bold move.

Thundered!!!!

A Blood River Behemoth was blown up by him.
